allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([k for k in d.get\('dependencies',{}\) if 'd3' in k.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('package.json'\)\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys; lines=[l.strip\(\) for l in sys.stdin]; print\([l for l in lines if 'd3' in l.lower\(\)]\)")
